items.title: @TimePreference_ Inflation is a general rise in prices. Long ago Milton Friedman
items.content:
@TimePreference_ Inflation is a general rise in prices. Long ago Milton Friedman declared inflation to be a purely monetary phenomenon, but the ‘70s oil shocks later proved him wrong.

Without new money the Cantillon Effect just shifts to secondary sources (the already rich).
